title: anisomeris fasciculata
intro: Anisomeris fasciculata, also known as the Cliff Brake, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the nettle family. It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The plant is believed to have several health benefits, including reducing fever, relieving pain and swelling, and treating skin conditions such as eczema and acne. Anisomeris fasciculata can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or infused oil, and is often used in traditional folk medicine to treat a variety of ailments.
